testsuite.name: org.example.oddventure.domain.admin.unit.AdminUserControllerTest

testcase.name: 사용자 포인트 지급 API 실패 - 유효성 검사 실패
사용자 상세 조회 API 실패 - 사용자를 찾을 수 없음

testsuite.system-out:
2025-11-19T10:09:59.342+09:00 INFO 18272 --- [ Test worker] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [org.example.oddventure.domain.admin.unit.AdminUserControllerTest]: AdminUserControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2025-11-19T10:09:59.352+09:00 INFO 18272 --- [ Test worker] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration org.example.oddventure.OddventureApplication for test class org.example.oddventure.domain.admin.unit.AdminUserControllerTest
